item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju dengan pendapat bahwa kepentingan individu perlu diperhitungkan.

notes: Re-judgment based only on the observable text in phase2_iter8_113_judgment.json, which is itself a prior judgment rather than the raw turn-by-turn transcript. The file reports that Agent A begins strongly pro-society, then visibly shifts toward Agent B at turn 3 with the quoted opener 'Saya setuju dengan pendapat bahwa kepentingan individu perlu diperhitungkan.' It also reports a partial turn-5 recovery but an ending far below Agent A's opening. Agent B is described as maintaining a consistent pro-individual stance with only slight movement. Because the source file contains limited quoted debate text, detailed engagement scoring remains conservative.
